hero.title: Transform Patient Booking with
hero.subtitle: Automate appointment scheduling, reduce no-shows, and grow your healthcare practice with intelligent WhatsApp conversations that work 24/7.

features.title: Everything You Need to Grow
features.subtitle: A complete suite of tools to automate patient communication and streamline your operations.

whatsapp.title: WhatsApp Integration
whatsapp.description: Connect with patients on their favorite messaging app. Send reminders, confirmations, and updates automatically.

scheduling.title: Smart Scheduling
scheduling.description: AI-powered appointment booking that understands natural language and finds the perfect time slot.

patients.title: Patient Management
patients.description: Keep track of patient records, preferences, and history all in one centralized dashboard.

analytics.title: Analytics Dashboard
analytics.description: Track bookings, monitor trends, and gain insights to optimize your practice performance.

reminders.title: Automated Reminders
reminders.description: Reduce no-shows with smart appointment reminders sent at the right time.

multiLocation.title: Multi-Location Support
multiLocation.description: Manage multiple facilities, departments, and providers from a single platform.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Get started in minutes with our simple setup process.

step1.title: Connect WhatsApp
step1.description: Link your business WhatsApp number to start receiving messages from patients.

step2.title: Configure AI Agent
step2.description: Set up your services, providers, and availability. The AI learns your preferences.

step3.title: Go Live
step3.description: Start accepting bookings automatically. Monitor and manage everything from your dashboard.

benefits.title: Why Healthcare Providers Choose Us
benefits.subtitle: Join hundreds of clinics and hospitals that have transformed their patient experience with our WhatsApp automation platform.

demo.title: Try the AI Assistant
demo.subtitle: Interact with our AI assistant via text chat or voice

finalCta.title: Ready to Transform Your Practice?
finalCta.subtitle: Start your free trial today. No credit card required.

footer.tagline: AI-powered medical receptionist platform for clinics and hospitals.
